name: Resource Hijacking for Cryptomining
description: Detects cryptomining activity via process names, command lines, or mining pool connections
query:
// Detect cryptomining processes
// Trigger on known miner binaries or mining pool connections
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(xmrig|minerd|ethminer|cgminer|bfgminer|cpuminer|stratum\+tcp|stratum\+ssl|--coin=|--donate-level|--algo=)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
